name: Almond Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Coat a large baking sheet with vegetable cooking spray or cover with baking parchment.
3. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, orange peel, vanilla, and almond extract.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt.
5. Add the egg mixture to the flour mixture; mix just until blended.
6. Mix in the almonds.
7. Divide the dough into two halves.
8. Form each half into a log about 12 inches long, 1 1/2 inches wide, and 1/2 inch thick.
9. Bake the logs in the center of the oven for about 50 minutes until golden.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack for 5 minutes.
11. Reduce the oven temperature to 275°F.
12. Place the logs on a cutting board and cut them diagonally into 1/2 inch thick slices.
13. Lay the slices flat on baking sheets, spacing them slightly apart.
14. Return the slices to the oven and bake until dry and lightly toasted, about 20 to 25 minutes, turning once.
15. Place the biscuits on a rack to cool completely.
16. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 3 1/2 dozen.
